title: 311 StaffIdentityContext
description: Authenticated staff identity context. 311 freezes CIS2 as the governing auth provider and keeps organisation switching separate from raw role names.

authProvider.description: 311 freezes CIS2 as the authentication provider for hub staff flows.

affiliatedOrganisationRefs.description: Other organisations or sites the user may be permitted to act within.

tenantGrantRefs.description: Tenant-scope grants attached to the authenticated staff identity.

activeOrganisation.description: Organisation or site currently active for shell rendering and acting-context derivation.

rbacClaims.description: Resolved RBAC claims. These are necessary but never sufficient without acting context and visibility contracts.

nationalRbacRef.description: National RBAC profile or entitlement ref.

localRoleRefs.description: Local role refs bound to the staff identity in the active or affiliated organisations.

sessionAssurance.description: Assurance level for the authenticated staff session.

identityState.description: Current trust state of the staff identity session.
